node.name: surfaces
node.tagline: whiskey-translucent fractals splayed in the night sky
node.subtitle: vibe-coded surfaces ;; each a small burning thing

surfaces.title: SPACETIME
surfaces.flavor: geometry as gravitation ;; mass curves the sheet
surfaces.desc: GR demo ;; warped grid, geodesics, frame dragging around star / gas giant / black hole.

surfaces.title: HORIZONS EDGE
surfaces.flavor: boundary work ;; the line that bends back
surfaces.desc: horizons edge — a small surface at the limit case.

surfaces.title: SPINNYROCK
surfaces.desc: rotating mineral ;; angular momentum as toy.

surfaces.title: PDFS
surfaces.flavor: probability, vaporwaved ;; densities you can see
surfaces.desc: vaporwave-styled interactive 3D probability density function visualizer (React + Three.js).

surfaces.title: FRACTAL MEMES
surfaces.desc: drop an image ;; generate fractals of a meme.

surfaces.title: SENTENCE LENGTH ANALYZER
surfaces.desc: deepfates sentence analyzer ;; counting beats in written text.

surfaces.title: ISING 2
surfaces.desc: 2D ising model ;; magnetic phase transition as toy. several attractors inside.

surfaces.title: NEAM SHELL DOMAINS
surfaces.flavor: noisy denoising ;; domains emerge from chaos
surfaces.desc: shell lattice denoising with domain tracking — dynamic, Ising-tracked, and fixed modes.
